nodes.label: T00 Field Overview & History

provenance.why_it_matters: What is LE? Origins in cognitive science, instructional design, systems engineering. ICICLE body of knowledge. Why LE is distinct from instructional design.

nodes.label: T01 Learning Science Foundations

provenance.why_it_matters: Cognitive load theory; spaced practice; retrieval; worked examples; transfer. The scientific basis for design decisions.

nodes.label: T02 Systems Engineering & Human Factors

provenance.why_it_matters: Human systems integration; HSI principles; human as top-level design constraint; MBSE; sociotechnical systems.

nodes.label: T03 Learning Engineering Process

provenance.why_it_matters: LE as iterative, evidence-based design process. Rapid prototyping; formative evaluation; A/B testing in learning contexts.

nodes.label: T04 Measurement & Analytics

provenance.why_it_matters: Learning analytics; educational data mining; psychometrics; competency assessment; performance measurement.

nodes.label: T05 Knowledge Representation

provenance.why_it_matters: Ontologies; knowledge graphs; concept maps; prerequisite relationships; competency frameworks; skill taxonomies.

nodes.label: T06 Intelligent Tutoring & Adaptive Systems

provenance.why_it_matters: ITS architecture; knowledge tracing; Bayesian student models; ALEKS; Cognitive Tutor; modern DKT.

nodes.label: T07 AI & Foundation Models in Learning

provenance.why_it_matters: LLM tutors; generative feedback; AI-generated content; automated hint systems; risks and opportunities.

nodes.label: T08 Simulation & Experiential Learning

provenance.why_it_matters: Serious games; XR/VR/AR; simulation fidelity; transfer; after-action review; scenario design.

nodes.label: T09 Expert Knowledge Elicitation

provenance.why_it_matters: Cognitive task analysis; SME elicitation; tacit knowledge; PKSM; knowledge auditing; elicitation pipelines.

nodes.label: T10 Workforce Development & Training Systems

provenance.why_it_matters: Military/defense training; healthcare training; large-scale workforce upskilling; apprenticeship; on-the-job learning.

nodes.label: T11 Learning Infrastructure & Platforms

provenance.why_it_matters: LMS; xAPI/Tin Can; data interoperability; learning record stores; open standards; platform architecture.

nodes.label: T12 Instructional Design & Curriculum

provenance.why_it_matters: ADDIE; backward design; competency-based design; curriculum mapping; learning objectives taxonomy.

nodes.label: T13 High-Consequence & Complex Domains

provenance.why_it_matters: Defense/national security; healthcare; emergency response; aviation; nuclear. Stakes of performance gaps. Human error.

nodes.label: T14 Ethics, Equity & Responsible LE

provenance.why_it_matters: Algorithmic fairness in adaptive systems; data privacy; equity in access; avoiding automation bias in assessment.

nodes.label: T15 Evidence & Evaluation Standards

provenance.why_it_matters: What counts as evidence? Level 1-4 Kirkpatrick; decision-grade evidence; reproducibility in LE research.

nodes.label: T16 Standards, Credentialing & Community

provenance.why_it_matters: IEEE ICICLE body of knowledge; LE credential pathways; professional community development; field maturation.

nodes.label: T17 Research Methods & Field Development

provenance.why_it_matters: Randomized trials in education; quasi-experimental designs; design-based research; open science; replication.
